name: ssh
description: Connect to verified SSH hosts, run remote commands and scripts, transfer files, and manage local SSH agent identities.

interface.longDescription: Use the local OpenSSH client from Codex with strict host-key checking, public-key-only authentication, explicit connection timeouts, remote stdin scripts, SCP transfers, and local ssh-agent lifecycle helpers.
defaultPrompt: Inspect the remote host over SSH
Run this remote maintenance script over SSH
